helpful: The snapshot exposed both the CVSG and the later dismissal-related abeyance request.
The petition and brief in opposition permitted direct comparison of the asserted split and vehicle objections.
The statpack supplied calibrated modern-cert, CVSG, circuit, Term, and paid-petition base rates.
gaps: The ranged corpus query failed because the corpus-store hostname could not be resolved.

notes: The provisioned record was sufficient to complete the prediction. The failed corpus query returned no priors; CourtListener MCP remained available for general legal context.
